data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B37BB: The power contained in the METEORITE...\pBy amplifying its power with this\nmachine, MT. CHIMNEY's volcanic activity\lwill instantly intensify...\pFufufu... The volcano will erupt, spewing\nlava that will cool and harden.\lIt will expand the landmass...
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B38B3:
MAXIE: You again...\pNow listen.
We humans have grown on dry land.\pThe land is everything!
Its importance is paramount!\pThat is why we of TEAM MAGMA are
committed to expanding the landmass.\pIt will create space for new species
of POKéMON to evolve.\pIt will give us humans more space to
advance.\pThat is TEAM MAGMA's vision!\pI can't allow an ignorant child like
you to get in our way.\pI, MAXIE, will show you the
consequences of meddling!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3A68: What?!\pI, MAXIE, was caught off guard?!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3A90: MAXIE: Ah, whatever.\nI will give up our plans for MT. CHIMNEY\lfor the time being...\pBut no one can ever stop us!\nTEAM MAGMA will prevail!\pDon't you ever forget that!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3B36: Hehehe!\pSo you've come all the way here!\pBut you're too late!\nI've already delivered the METEORITE\lfrom METEOR FALLS to the BOSS!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3BB8: Hehehe...\nSo I lost...\pI'm sure glad I never took you on back\nat METEOR FALLS.
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3C07: Hehehe!\pYou might have beaten me, but you don't\nstand a chance against the BOSS!\pIf you get lost now, you won't have to\nface a sound whipping!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3C96: We of TEAM MAGMA are working hard for\neveryone's sake.\pLike, if there's more land, there'd be\nmore places to live.\lEveryone'd be happy!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3D1E: Hunh?\nWhat do you mean I lost?
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3D3D: Our BOSS says, “It will make everyone\nhappy.”\pBut why does everyone keep getting\nin our way?
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3D9A: That annoying TEAM AQUA...\nThey always mess with our plans!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3DF5: Go! Stomp TEAM AQUA!\nAnd expand the land!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3E1F: Stay out of our way, okay?\pWe're trying to enlarge the landmass\nfor the good of everybody!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.UnknownString_81B3E94: We're going to keep making more land!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3EC1:
ARCHIE: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you must stop TEAM MAGMA
for me!\pThey're trying to make this volcano
erupt by using the stolen METEORITE's\lpower!\pIt's all a part of their plans to
expand the world's landmass!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3F8C: ARCHIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you've got to stop TEAM MAGMA\nfor me!\pDealing with these three thugs is\na lot, even for me!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3FFE:
ARCHIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}! Thank you!\pWith your help, we thwarted TEAM
MAGMA's destructive plan!\pBut... This victory doesn't mean the
end of their evil plans.\pWe will remain vigilant and keep up
our pursuit of TEAM MAGMA.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, we shall meet again!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B40EA: Darn... TEAM MAGMA outnumbers us!\nWe can't keep up with them!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B4128: If they expand the land, there'll be\nless habitats for WATER POKéMON!
data/text/magma_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B416E: TEAM MAGMA wants to expand the\nlandmass... How's that for insane?
